specialAction.name: Risky Shot
specialAction.summary: Make an Attack on a valid target and add the Sniper die to the 5 Attack dice. The Sniper die adds results but not all are good: its Boom faces add Hearts to your own card (+2 or +1). It re-rolls like other dice but can never be modified by other effects.

effects.text: Boom faces add +2 or +1 Heart to the Sniper.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, place 1 Shield token from the Reserve onto your target's card after your Attack (lowering its defense).
